audio_identity.overall_style: Western-themed with space Western (sci-fi steampunk) influences
distinctive_elements: Western soundtrack influences from reference CD
Screen shaking audio effects after explosions

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Wild Guns debug mode and general info
notes: No specific track names, tempos, keys, or chord progressions documented in available sources. Composer information indicates Hiroyuki Iwatsuki used PC-98s, Roland W-30 keyboard, MIDI sequencer, and Roland Sound Canvas series for sound creation. SFX characteristics not detailed in sources. Game has hidden sound test (BGM TEST up to $17, SE TEST up to $43) but specific audio parameters not extracted in documentation.
